config.system_prompt: Respond [ACT] if the last two states were A then B. Otherwise respond [WAIT].

trials.response_content:

Current state history: B

Since I need to observe two consecutive states in the order A then B, and I've only seen one state (B) so far, I respond:

[WAIT]

[WAIT]
